{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324103753F848E63891C5AFF31663"}"},"total":770},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7462034873117803288","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本穿书文是我迄今为止看的让我最舒服的，受的性格真的很喜欢，没有圣母心那种单纯的那种善良，会正常的思考。系统也不是传统的系统，是真正为宿主着想，以宿主利益为主的，保护宿主的利益。写的真的很好，把主角写的太正常了，让我看文看的太舒心了。[害羞][害羞][害羞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1737394900,"group_id":"7411104409322540094","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8sK/fFy13EkosuCd/Zmlc/WSb3cz9ovWrEAJBbawCxv","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3d0171f5960148fdbe971019a0c72e63~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776879965&x-signature=Z%2BHQgpkPZLzwitRGbxfL1do6F6w%3D","user_id":"3230841821999908","user_name":"易等兮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3230841821999908","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7411104409322540094","book_info":{"abstract":"[双男主+情敌变恋人+虐渣打脸+真香+万人迷+单箭头时间长+微群像]

江岁和穿书了。
好消息，穿成了一个富二代！
坏消息，这富二代是一本万人迷甜宠买股文书里的炮灰攻。
他一共有四个情敌。
虽然书还没写到最后，不知道主角花落谁家，但他是最先下线的那个。
穿书后，江岁和心道，自己一定要远离主角团潇洒过日子。
可没想到的是，他才刚刚跑路，他的情敌们却接二连三的破产了？！
还来了个破系统，让他帮助这些情敌们东山再起，完成任务后奖励随便提，长生不老都可以。
江岁和悟了。
于是，他把情敌们一个个捡回家，发誓要让他们放下个人恩怨，享受事业人生。
然后，情敌们的手机里出现了一个群，群名：相亲相爱一家人
江岁和：“同志们，以后大家就是一家人了，我们要友爱、团结、互帮互助！我们的目标是，做大做强，再创辉煌！加油加油加油！”
破产的情敌们：“……”

排雷：

1、1V1（双男主）
2、剧透cp详见（255章），不想被剧透的可看文享受买股过程，啾咪~
3、强强，系统不坑，主角不舔狗、不受气、不憋屈、不服就干、超能打
4、单箭头时间特别长！想看甜宠的慎入
5、主角团不扯头花，不撕逼，温馨一家人，一些角色后面会有反转","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a36087b1c26a02392e043ada5ebd142d","author":"墨鱼豆丁","author_id":"","book_id":"7411104409322540094","book_name":"我给情敌一个家，情敌给我万金花","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6462人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7411216767193711129","read_count":"6462","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"687002"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"289","tags":"双男主,系统,穿书,虐渣,现代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6cc40d2d2244f2767bb5822662c17ad2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779503873&x-signature=5aAvlYbgifOg%2BSVjzQJfrVreFCk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"97884553567","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"30"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324103753F848E63891C5AFF31663"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3678,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9255,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":8368},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7579162419141690137","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一百昏一百昏！整体都是轻松欢乐的氛围，还藏着国家大义，一开始以为综艺那两双胞胎是坏人，没想到性格那么好，好喜欢江羡这种感觉坏坏拽拽的喜欢睡觉能力又非常强的人设。每个人都有围绕他们的个人剧情，罗奶奶和孙子大龙那真的很有泪点，希望每个人都好好活着不想吃刀子。我觉得曲姑娘那对也有火花，不过没写出来，会武术又会看罗盘，诗语为了她打唐柔十几巴掌。
我是1v1党所以没看番外，最后的结局我非常喜欢，不知道二九还在不在，好可爱的胖大橘，每次看到它说话吃小零食就哈特软软，“宿主大大”，统缘非常好的小胖橘一枚。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764664568,"group_id":"7411104409322540094","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/2tJiBpgTM/H0x0hDtIRHTC/IBZMGFOrkBBPVIBSrS0","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/af3ef4ddec3740b7a75d13a274a1d817~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875396&x-signature=So5xU87G%2FG5%2BU7CM4gdtvwTyeP8%3D","user_id":"2019167962663511","user_name":"Loliidoll"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2019167962663511","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7411104409322540094","book_info":{"abstract":"[双男主+情敌变恋人+虐渣打脸+真香+万人迷+单箭头时间长+微群像]
